approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to park blocked work and keep going. The Foundation Done bar made Scoper evidence readback the next safe visibility slice.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub Scoper evidence trace readback over current Director recommendations without promoting candidates or mutating backlog/routes.
constraints: Do not auto-promote Director candidates into backlog, Scoper, Portfolio, or Current Sprint.
Do not approve, apply, reject, snooze, reroute, or promote live action routes.
Do not create backlog, decision, or open-question records from live recommendations.
Do not send Telegram, email, Slack, Agent Feedback, or public messages.
Do not run extraction, source sync, provider/model calls, login, Browserbase, paid/private source work, or external writes.
Fail proof if a candidate without both raw atom and raw hit evidence is marked ready for Portfolio review.
